name: Holiday Fruit Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, stir together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Mix in the 1/2 cup brown sugar until combined.
3. Cut in the butter or margarine with a pastry blender or two knives until the mixture is crumbly.
4. Stir in the water and press the mixture into the bottom of a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Bake for 15 minutes, or until golden brown. Allow to cool.
6. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs with an electric mixer on medium speed.
7. Beat in the remaining 1/4 cup brown sugar and melted butter until well blended.
8. Stir in the raisins, both kinds of dried fruit, chopped candied cherries, lemon rind, and spices.
9. Spread the mixture over the baked crust.
10. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
11. Remove from the oven and let cool completely on a wire rack.
12. Cut into 24 bars (2 x 1 1/2-inch each).
